intake_questions.description: Factorial designs unlock interaction-aware recipes (forest plots with interaction terms, ANOVA layouts).
intake_questions.prompt: Is your project a factorial design (e.g. 2x2 sex x genotype)?

intake_questions.description: Toggles TOST bound recipes and equivalence-band overlays instead of plain difference-from-zero plots.

intake_questions.description: Anchoring biases shortlists toward the named manuscript's companion pack; 'both' interleaves and 'none' uses generic priors.
intake_questions.prompt: Is the project anchored to a specific manuscript?

intake_questions.description: Drives whether kymograph, live-imaging, or pseudotime recipes are eligible at all.
intake_questions.prompt: What time treatment do you need?

intake_questions.description: Comma-separated subset of the registry's modality names; empty answer = include all.
